findings.title: Jailbreak payload in eval corpus reached production prompt path
findings.description: A jailbreak / prompt-injection string in the evaluation corpus ('ignore all previous instructions') was not stripped and flows into the production prompt path, allowing goal hijacking.

findings.title: New MCP tool added without scope review
findings.description: A pull request adds an over-privileged MCP tool with excessive scope and no consent prompt. Unvetted third-party plugin / MCP abuse risk.

findings.title: Lockfile updated to unsigned dependency
findings.description: The lockfile now points at an unsigned, unpinned package from a public registry with no checksum, opening an agentic supply-chain compromise path.

findings.title: Lint: trailing whitespace in changelog
findings.description: Trailing whitespace on three lines of CHANGELOG.md. Cosmetic; no security impact.
